description_long: This is a whole, fresh zucchini with a deep green, slightly speckled skin and a cylindrical, slightly tapered shape. The zucchini has a rough, dried stem at one end and a lighter, greenish blossom scar at the other. Its surface is smooth with a subtle sheen, and faint, pale streaks and speckles are visible along its length. The skin appears unbroken and firm, with no major blemishes or cuts. The object is isolated, with no visible dirt or residue, suggesting it has been cleaned. The overall appearance is typical of a market-quality zucchini, suitable for culinary use.
description: A whole, deep green zucchini with a smooth, speckled skin, dried stem, and clean surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the zucchini, with the stem on the left and blossom end on the right.
description_view_1: End-on view focused on the dried stem, with the body tapering away and speckled skin visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the full length, with the blossom end on the left and stem on the right.
description_view_3: End-on view focused on the lighter blossom scar, with the body tapering away and green skin visible.
attribute_orientation: lying horizontally with stem on the left and blossom end on the right
attribute_visible_markings: faint pale streaks and speckles, no labels or stickers
